convergence.visible_evidence: P001, P004, P005, and P006 show materially different body plans, proportions, silhouette vectors, dominant ideas, roles, face mechanisms, and prop families. Humanoids do not share one coat, armor, body, expression, or exposure pattern; monsters do not collapse into one demon anatomy.
convergence.closest_controlled_neighbors: Korath, Veyra, and Malachor remain yoke, shell-clamp, and flesh-fortress tanks; Cashmere and Luna remain ledger-column and diagonal-bridge mages; Knoll and Quillith remain stamp-receipt and side-slate supports; Nyxa and Sable remain membrane-bow and extreme-rifle marksmen.
